pageContext.name: Pooh Carved by Heart
pageContext.description: This enchanting Winnie the Pooh statuette showcases the Hundred Acre Wood crew in stunning detail. Pooh, Piglet, Rabbit, Tigger, Owl, and Eeyore gather outside Pooh's house. Covered in astonishing patchwork detail, this Disney collectible is unmistakably Jim Shore!  Disney fans and friends, come snuggle up with the Pooh Carved by Heart Figurine today!
